text:
Families (TANF) Cash Code ― January–December (01–12) 

DESCRIPTION: A monthly flag that indicates whether the beneficiary received Federal Temporary Assistance for 
Needy Families (TANF) benefits. There are separate variables for each of the 12 months during the 
year. 

SHORT NAME: TANF_CASH_CD_01 
TANF_CASH_CD_02 
TANF_CASH_CD_03 
TANF_CASH_CD_04 
TANF_CASH_CD_05 
TANF_CASH_CD_06 
 TANF_CASH_CD_07 
TANF_CASH_CD_08 
TANF_CASH_CD_09 
TANF_CASH_CD_10 
TANF_CASH_CD_11 
TANF_CASH_CD_12 

LONG
